components.name: D-glucose
components.evidence: supplemented with ... glucose to a final concentration of 20 g L-1 (bioreactor medium)

components.name: ammonium chloride (NH4Cl)
components.evidence: autoclaved base salt solution: 5 g L-1 NH4Cl, 2 g L-1 K2HPO4, and 0.5 g L-1 NaCl in MQ H2O

components.name: dipotassium phosphate (K2HPO4)
components.evidence: 5 g L-1 NH4Cl, 2 g L-1 K2HPO4, and 0.5 g L-1 NaCl

components.name: sodium chloride (NaCl)
components.evidence: 5 g L-1 NH4Cl, 2 g L-1 K2HPO4, and 0.5 g L-1 NaCl

components.name: magnesium sulfate heptahydrate (MgSO4.7H2O)
components.evidence: supplemented with sterile-filtered 0.74 g L-1 MgSO4.7H2O (bioreactor); secondary preculture used 0.25 + 0.74 additions

components.name: iron(II) sulfate heptahydrate (FeSO4.7H2O)
components.concentration: 10 g/L in trace element solution (added 2 mL/L)
components.evidence: trace element solution: 10 g/L FeSO4.7H2O, 2.25 g/L ZnSO4.7H2O, 2 g/L CaCl2.2H2O, 1 g/L CuSO4.5H2O, 0.38 g/L MnCl2.4H2O, 0.14 g/L H3BO3, and 0.1 g/L (NH4)6Mo7O24.4H2O in 5 M HCl; added at 2 mL L-1

components.name: zinc sulfate heptahydrate (ZnSO4.7H2O)
components.concentration: 2.25 g/L in trace element solution (added 2 mL/L)

components.name: calcium chloride dihydrate (CaCl2.2H2O)
components.concentration: 2 g/L in trace element solution (added 2 mL/L)

components.name: copper(II) sulfate pentahydrate (CuSO4.5H2O)
components.concentration: 1 g/L in trace element solution (added 2 mL/L)

components.name: manganese(II) chloride tetrahydrate (MnCl2.4H2O)
components.concentration: 0.38 g/L in trace element solution (added 2 mL/L)

components.name: boric acid (H3BO3)
components.concentration: 0.14 g/L in trace element solution (added 2 mL/L)
components.evidence: 0.14 g/L H3BO3 (printed 'H2BO3'; boric acid) ... in 5 M HCl

components.name: ammonium molybdate tetrahydrate ((NH4)6Mo7O24.4H2O)
components.concentration: 0.1 g/L in trace element solution (added 2 mL/L)

components.name: cobalt(II) chloride hexahydrate (CoCl2.6H2O)
components.evidence: 2 mL L-1 of 50 mg L-1 cobalt solution (CoCl2.6H2O)

components.name: O2 (dissolved oxygen, air sparging)
components.concentration: DO >= 40% (aerobic phase); N2 sparged for anaerobic phase
components.evidence: aerobic: DO >= 40% via continuous sparging air at 600 mL/min; anaerobic phase initiated via N2 sparging

media.base_medium: Defined mineral (glucose minimal) medium, modified from Thorfinnsdottir et al. 2023 (higher glucose)

sources_chased.what: base mineral medium + trace element solution cited as Thorfinnsdottir et al. [22]

media.notes: Bioreactor mineral glucose medium; base salts/Mg/glucose/cobalt from the target paper's main text, and the full 7-component trace element solution recovered from the directly cited Thorfinnsdottir et al. 2023 (PMC9965072). The bioreactor formulation uses NH4Cl/K2HPO4/NaCl directly (not the 10X Na2HPO4-containing salt solution used for the secondary preculture), so no Na2HPO4 is present. No vitamins are used (defined mineral medium). Trace metals were the missing piece; concentration_mM values are final-in-medium molarities after the 2 mL/L dilution.
